component.name: ShellKeep
component.summary: Persistent SSH terminal sessions with tmux integration

description.p: ShellKeep is a GTK 3 application that provides persistent SSH terminal sessions backed by tmux. It automatically saves and restores your session layout per device, supports multiple environments (named groups of sessions), and reconnects seamlessly after network interruptions.

ul.li: Named environments for organizing sessions by context
Automatic reconnection with exponential backoff and jitter
Session scrollback history preserved on the server
System tray integration for background operation
